name: Sex On Phone
description: Amanda, compelled to make ends meet, gets employed in a confidential call center where she fulfills the desires of her callers. When her husband finds out about her odd job, things become chaotic.

name: Sex Games
description: A rich couple often spices up their sexual relationship by doing their so-called Sex Games. But when they meet a new set of 'playmates' – a conservative couple, their game becomes more challenging.

name: Pamasahe
description: A penniless mother, with her infant child, takes on a journey by land and sea to find her husband in Manila. But this trip won't be free for she has to use her body to get to her destination.

name: Next Room Affair
description: A lonely student becomes obsessed with the secret affairs of her neighbor - until she crosses the line between observer and participant, becoming part of the cycle she once only watched.

name: Sulutan
description: When Mara discovers her groom's betrayal, she confides in Lena, a newfound friend. Their bond deepens into desire, risking their careers and shattering lives with dangerous outcome.
